diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -4,7 +4,7 @@
 from transformers import AutoModel

 

 class AudioDeepfakeDetector(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, encoder_name='facebook/wav2vec2-xls-r-300m', freeze_encoder=True):

+    def __init__(self, encoder_name='facebook/wav2vec2-base', freeze_encoder=True):

         super().__init__()

         self.encoder = AutoModel.from_pretrained(encoder_name)

         

@@ -18,13 +18,13 @@
         

         # Add classification head with appropriate capacity and regularization

         self.classifier = nn.Sequential(

-            nn.Dropout(0.3),

+            nn.Dropout(0.5),  # Increased dropout

             nn.Linear(hidden_size, 256),

             nn.ReLU(),

-            nn.Dropout(0.3),

+            nn.Dropout(0.5),  # Increased dropout

             nn.Linear(256, 64),

             nn.ReLU(),

-            nn.Dropout(0.2),

+            nn.Dropout(0.3),  # Moderate dropout

             nn.Linear(64, 1)  # Output single logit for binary classification

         )
